root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

data_date.text: หุ้น ณ วันที่

root.sql:
select 'This is to certify that '||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name_eng(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no))||' the guarantor/sponsor of' as paragraph_1 , ' '||'!guarantor_of!'||' is a member of our customers, has an amount of' as paragraph_2 , ' '||REPLACE(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' ))::bigint), RIGHT(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' ))::bigint),3),null)||' in baht currency or '|| (to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' )/'!rate_of!')::bigint))||' '||'!currency!'|| ' at the exchange rate of '||'!rate_of!'||' Baht per '||'!currency!' as paragraph_3 , ' as a stockholder of Teachers’ Saving Co-operative of the General Education Department Ltd.' as paragraph_4 , ' This amount of shares stated above can be converted and withdrawn into cash' as paragraph_5 , ' immediately upon request from the member.' as paragraph_6 , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' )as share_mem , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','SD')as day , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','MM')as month , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','MM'))::int,'LE')as month_eng , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','YYYY')::integer-543 as year , '!data_date!'as data_date , '!book_no!'as book_no , '!guarantor_of!'as guarantor_of , '!currency!'as currency , '!rate_of!'as rate_of , (select trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name_eng(membership_no)) from sc_hr_off_member where sc_hr_off_member.official_position = '008' )as manager_name_eng , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cnt_m_coop where 1=1 and pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' ) > 0 --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '039660' /*WHERE*/
